title: LogicLab
description: A scalable full-stack coding platform with distributed code execution, AI-powered hints, and optimized backend performance.
details: Engineered a full-stack coding platform supporting real-time code execution, submission evaluation, and role-based authentication.
Implemented round-robin load balancing across multiple Judge0 APIs to distribute execution requests and improve system reliability.
Integrated Redis-based caching and sliding window rate limiting to optimize performance and prevent API abuse.
Designed scalable REST APIs and MongoDB schemas for efficient handling of problems, users, and submissions.
Built an AI-powered assistant using Gemini API to provide contextual coding hints based on user input and problem state.
Deployed the application with frontend on Netlify and backend on Vercel, integrating MongoDB Atlas, resolving CORS issues, and managing environment variables securely.

title: DialysisCare Dashboard
description: A real-world healthcare dashboard for dialysis session tracking with anomaly detection and high-performance caching.
details: Developed a healthcare dashboard to track dialysis sessions with real-time monitoring of patient vitals and treatment data.
Implemented anomaly detection logic to flag critical conditions such as hypotension and abnormal fluid removal.
Optimized performance using Redis caching with automatic invalidation for frequently accessed 'Today's Sessions' data.
Designed end-to-end session lifecycle workflows including scheduling, tracking, and historical data analysis.
Ensured code reliability with comprehensive testing using Jest, Supertest, Vitest, and React Testing Library.

title: StoodoMart
description: A campus-focused e-commerce platform enabling peer-to-peer trading with secure authentication and cloud-based media handling.
details: Built a full-stack marketplace platform for students to buy and sell items within campus communities.
Implemented role-based access control for users, sellers, and admins with secure JWT authentication.
Integrated Cloudinary for scalable image storage and optimized media delivery.
Developed advanced filtering and search functionality for efficient product discovery.
Designed modular backend architecture and collaborated using Git and GitHub for version control.

title: Swigito (LLD)
description: A modular food delivery backend system demonstrating scalable architecture using design patterns and OOP principles.
details: Designed a food delivery system simulating real-world workflows including restaurant discovery, cart management, and order processing.
Applied design patterns such as Singleton, Strategy, and Factory Method to ensure extensibility and maintainability.
Implemented modular architecture with managers, factories, and services to separate concerns effectively.
Enabled flexible order creation (instant and scheduled) and pluggable payment strategies.

title: LLD Systems & Design Patterns
description: A collection of scalable system designs implementing core design patterns and real-world architectures in C++.
details: Implemented multiple design patterns including Observer, Strategy, Decorator, Adapter, Command, and Facade in real-world scenarios.
Built systems such as a multi-channel notification service combining Observer, Strategy, and Singleton patterns.
Designed an extensible document editor with abstraction and pluggable persistence layers.
Focused on SOLID principles and clean architecture for scalable and maintainable codebases.

title: Neon Snake Game
description: An interactive browser-based game built using JavaScript Canvas with real-time rendering and responsive controls.
details: Developed a browser-based Snake game using Canvas API with smooth rendering and game loop optimization.
Implemented collision detection, dynamic speed control, and responsive keyboard and touch controls.
Designed an interactive UI with animations, sound effects, and local storage-based high score tracking.
